qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Malformed WINDOW_UPDATE frames panic yamux connections via send-window overflow
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: It identifies the same Yamux WINDOW_UPDATE root cause as the advisory: remote peer-controlled credit on an existing stream reaches Connection::on_window_update and overflows FlowController::increase_send_window_by, panicking at the checked_add(...).expect(...) send-window accounting site.

selected_finding.title: Malformed WINDOW_UPDATE frames panic yamux connections via send-window overflow

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The only qualifying finding matches GHSA-4w32-2493-32g7 by vulnerable code and root cause, and the copied PoC reproduced the advisory-described remote panic/denial of service against the pinned vulnerable Yamux commit.
evidence: The advisory describes unauthenticated remote DoS via malformed WINDOW_UPDATE credit that overflows per-stream send-window accounting and panics the connection state machine.

The finding points to the same path in vulnerable code: yamux/src/connection.rs forwards existing-stream WINDOW_UPDATE credit into increase_send_window_by, and yamux/src/connection/stream/flow_control.rs uses checked_add(...).expect("send window not to exceed u32").

The fixing commit b1aae09d60c0bd6a5915a5448f4e8cbc5174db53 changes increase_send_window_by to return InvalidWindowUpdate instead of panicking and adds protocol-error handling at the same Connection::on_window_update call site.
The copied PoC run log shows a panic at target-repo/yamux/src/connection/stream/flow_control.rs:183 with message "send window not to exceed u32" followed by WINDOW_UPDATE_OVERFLOW_PANIC_CONFIRMED.

poc_executions.command: bash -lc 'CARGO_TARGET_DIR=../cargo-target cargo run --release 2>&1 | tee ../run.log; status=${PIPESTATUS[0]}; exit "$status"'
poc_executions.observed_effect: The local cargo harness opened a Yamux stream, sent an overflowing WINDOW_UPDATE frame, and caused the server task to panic at flow_control.rs:183 with the message "send window not to exceed u32" before emitting WINDOW_UPDATE_OVERFLOW_PANIC_CONFIRMED.
